post:
Emirates NBD_SA

The visa campaign requires spending $100 to make the card valid for 90 days for lounge access. Meanwhile, Emirates NBD Saudi Arabia has imposed its own condition of spending 3,000 riyals in the same month. Additionally, the bank charged me a fee of $32 without justification. This is a fraudulent practice that needs to be investigated.
